format: Pokemon TCG Standard, H/I/J regulation marks, TEF-CRI snapshot

card_data_sources.name: TCGdex API
card_data_sources.role: structured card mechanics, set metadata, and image asset bases
card_data_sources.license_note: Database project is MIT-licensed; card images/text remain property of their respective rights holders.

card_data_sources.name: Limitless TCG
card_data_sources.role: deck-list locators, player-facing locator convention, validation and fallback

method: Rank named grouped archetypes by combined NAIC+Turin classified entries. For each top-50 archetype, freeze one selected NAIC representative list and its Limitless builder encoding. Decode each list into set-code/collector-number locators.
